Reversed Operations not available in the stdlib operator module.
Defining these instead of using lambdas allows us to reference them by name.
left
rightr
;/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/pandas/core/roperator.py
radd
rsub
rmul
rdiv
rtruediv
	rfloordiv
Nz! cannot perform the operation mod)
isinstance
type
__name__
	TypeError)
typr
rmod 
divmodr
rdivmod+
rpow/
operator
and_r
rand_3
or_r
ror_7
xorr
rxor;
__doc__r
<module>
